title: Bring Back Default Board Views - PLEASE!
excerpt:
Description
We’ve noticed that the ability to set a default view for a board has been removed. This was a simple but essential feature for our workflow, and without it, every time we open a board, it defaults to the Main…

posts.author: LukeB (Luke Borg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We’ve noticed that the ability to set a default view for a board has been removed. This was a simple but essential feature for our workflow, and without it, every time we open a board, it defaults to the Main Table view, even if that’s not the one we use most often.

While we appreciate the recent improvements around board views—like pinning, rearranging, and customizing tabs—the removal of default view functionality has created unnecessary friction.

Even reintroducing this as a legacy toggle (e.g. under Customization > Features) would go a long way in improving usability for teams like ours.

Please consider bringing this feature back! It’s small but makes a big difference.

What are you trying to achieve

Please bring back the ability to set default board views on page load.

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to second this.

Shocked to find that this has been removed, quite honestly

posts.author: SMCarter (Sarah Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, this functionality is what sold my newest onboarded team on using the platform with the workflow I created and I was surprised to find it is no longer an option. Please reinstate.

posts.author: ruskyAU (John)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. It’s now also not possible to set the Forms view as the default on the right hand side pop-up. Everything defaults to Updates view now and other views have ‘set as default’ greyed out. What is happening with Monday!

posts.author: KMegginson (Kyle Megginson)
posts.cookedHtml: UPVOTED. Can we please at least hear some feedback from Monday.com team on this? What was the purpose for removing this functionality, and how do we get this reinstated? This is important for my teams as well.
